description.en: Demand side, supply side, complementor, or ecosystem actor.
description.zh: 需求侧、供给侧、互补方或生态参与者。

description.en: Core value exchange, matching, or transaction flow.
description.zh: 核心价值交换、匹配或交易流程。

description.en: Rules, trust mechanisms, quality controls, or incentives.
description.zh: 规则、信任机制、质量控制或激励。

description.en: Cold start, fraud, regulatory, or monetization risk.
description.zh: 冷启动、欺诈、监管或变现风险。

headline.en: Explain why a platform grows, stalls, or becomes hard to govern
headline.zh: 解释一个平台为什么增长、卡住或变得难以治理

whyOpen.en: Use this when BMC is too company-centered. The map separates demand, supply, core interaction, network effects, governance, monetization, and cold-start risks.
whyOpen.zh: 当 BMC 过于公司中心、看不清平台多边关系时用它：它会拆出需求侧、供给侧、核心交互、网络效应、治理、变现和冷启动风险。

audience.en: Teams analyzing marketplaces, developer ecosystems, payment networks, or AI/platform complements.
audience.zh: 适合分析市场平台、开发者生态、支付网络或 AI / 平台互补生态的团队。

firstSteps.en: Name each side before writing features; a platform has participants, not just users.
firstSteps.zh: 先命名每一边参与方，再写功能；平台面对的是参与方，不只是用户。

firstSteps.en: Describe the smallest repeatable core interaction in one sentence.
firstSteps.zh: 用一句话写清最小、可重复的核心交互。

outcomes.en: A platform ecosystem map that names sides, core interaction, value unit, network effects, governance choices, and monetization tension.
outcomes.zh: 一张说清参与方、核心互动、价值单元、网络效应、治理选择和变现张力的平台生态地图。

commonMisreads.en: A marketplace is not strong just because it has two sides; the loop must make one side more valuable to the other.
commonMisreads.zh: 有两边不等于有平台优势；必须说明一边增加如何让另一边更有价值。

practicePrompts.en: Which side is hardest to acquire first, and what non-scalable action could seed it?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪一边最难先启动？你可以用什么不可规模化动作先把它种起来？
